title: Misleading OP
wikitext:
[]: Misleading OP             Quote Post by ehh123 » Tue Sep 14, 2010 4:44 pm This is the opening for Evangelion in Taiwan. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c8mYJ9hUQzc Talk about misleading! I especially love how the song sounds like something for a 70s mecha anime!

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 14, 2010 4:47 pm Somebody found this a while back. I like the completely unrepresentative choices of scenes to depict each of the pilots with, particularly. It makes me imagine a phone conversation between the Taiwanese company and Gainax that included a lot of snickering and a " sure , we'll send you guys some cels to use for your opening." The clip of AU!Rei with toast in her mouth makes me wonder how many disappointed Taiwanese viewers sat through 25 and a half episodes waiting for that scene and wondering what the hell all this other crap was.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Sep 14, 2010 4:55 pm Not to mention that it gives away pretty much all of the action spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Sep 14, 2010 4:57 pm Damn, that was awesome. It makes me want to watch Arbegas now.

[]: The lyrics sounded Japanese to me, though...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Sep 14, 2010 5:03 pm I don't think it was too much more misleading than the original OP, but yeah... that music is priceless.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Sep 14, 2010 5:24 pm Haha, that's awesome. Gives the show a happier tone.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Tue Sep 14, 2010 7:07 pm If I didn't speak Mandarin, I would've thought that was a Bollywood dance number. Of course, given the sound quality I can barely understand it anytime.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Sep 14, 2010 8:18 pm That song is awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Sep 14, 2010 9:26 pm I am humbled by how wonderfully ridiculous this is. Since I know nothing about anime, except for the fact that moe (whatever the fuck that is) seems to be really popular right now, can someone direct me towards similar seventies style crap that I can amuse myself with? Please and thank you, hugs and kisses, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Tue Sep 14, 2010 9:31 pm This is hilarious. It's incredibly misleading, yet at the same time, as the fan that I am of this series I can imagine myself getting pumped seeing this opening just like when I see the original one. Anyone know what the song is saying? megwump-This the first thing I thought of when I watched the video. It might close to what you are looking for: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iG_misXT96U[/url:2m8ni4zq]

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Sep 14, 2010 10:06 pm shinji_ryoji_89 wrote: This is hilarious. It's incredibly misleading, yet at the same time, as the fan that I am of this series I can imagine myself getting pumped seeing this opening just like when I see the original one. Anyone know what the song is saying?

[]: Re: The lyrics sounded Japanese to me, though...             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Wed Sep 15, 2010 1:56 am Killer Bee wrote: I don't think it was too much more misleading than the original OP, but yeah... that music is priceless.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Wed Sep 15, 2010 4:28 am My favourite bit is the 'Ikari da!' part xD

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Sep 15, 2010 6:49 am Taiwanese? Pfft. Version 1: http://www.livevideo.com/video/BloodyHarry/CE33CAD926164D5691D5A1859C031F6D/evangelion-op-mandarin.aspx Version 2(Original broadcast version from the 90´s): http://www.tudou.com/programs/view/K_G5FjfoG_A/ The mandarin(Mainland China) version is way superior. It´s basically the Japanese OP, but loosely translated. (Plus, traditionalist censorship. This means: No Rei Towel Scene No AU panty peeking No Asuka/Misato fanservice)

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Sep 15, 2010 9:16 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I am humbled by how wonderfully ridiculous this is. Since I know nothing about anime, except for the fact that moe (whatever the fuck that is) seems to be really popular right now, can someone direct me towards similar seventies style crap that I can amuse myself with? Please and thank you, hugs and kisses, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Sep 15, 2010 10:35 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I am humbled by how wonderfully ridiculous this is. Since I know nothing about anime, except for the fact that moe (whatever the fuck that is) seems to be really popular right now, can someone direct me towards similar seventies style crap that I can amuse myself with? Please and thank you, hugs and kisses, etc.

[]: Re: The lyrics sounded Japanese to me, though...             Quote Post by COACH » Thu Sep 16, 2010 4:56 am Killer Bee wrote: I don't think it was too much more misleading than the original OP, but yeah... that music is priceless.

[]: Re: Misleading OP             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 7:30 pm ehh123 wrote: This is the opening for Evangelion in Taiwan. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c8mYJ9hUQzc Talk about misleading! I especially love how the song sounds like something for a 70s mecha anime!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 16, 2010 7:45 pm It's not the real OP, it's an AMV that's parodying the OP to Albegas (Voltron 2) , it even says that in the description.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 7:47 pm Ornette wrote: It's not the real OP, it's an AMV that's parodying the OP to Albegas (Voltron 2) , it even says that in the description.
